what_it_does: Lists six source files from the claude-ds project assigned to interpretive batch 026 in wave 002, recording each file's project name, relative path, and project root.
observations: All entries belong to project 'claude-ds' and share root '/home/tim/company/design/claude-ds'.
Every path is under the 'core/' directory.
The batch mixes .d.ts declaration files, .jsx implementation files, and one .html file.
Two name-pairs appear: DiagramSolver.d.ts / DiagramSolver.jsx and RenderType.d.ts / RenderType.jsx.
The file contains no symbols array or extracted code symbols.
standouts: Declaration/implementation pairing for DiagramSolver and RenderType.
Inclusion of generative-core.html alongside TypeScript and JSX core files.
Uniform project/root metadata for every entry.
conventions: Uses a consistent {project, path, root} triplet per entry.
Batch file is named under wave-002/alloc/batch-026.json.
File is a JSON array of file references rather than a single object.
concerns: No stated criteria for why these six files are grouped in this batch.
No version, timestamp, or author metadata.
No extracted symbols despite listing code files.
notes: This is a simple allocation manifest that tells downstream tooling which claude-ds core files to interpret together in batch 026.
questions: What selection criteria determined these six files belong together?
Is generative-core.html meant to be interpreted with the same depth as the .d.ts/.jsx files?
Are the .d.ts files intended to describe the adjacent .jsx files?
purpose_vs_actual: n/a — the file does not declare a purpose beyond listing allocated files, and its content matches that allocation role.
intention_signals: It appears to be trying to stage a focused set of claude-ds core source files for interpretive processing, keeping related declaration and implementation files together.
novelty: n/a — the file is a straightforward file-allocation list; the only slightly unusual aspect is pairing .d.ts and .jsx files in the same batch.
contribution: It contributes a curated, project-root-anchored manifest of core claude-ds files that a fused system can use to know which source artifacts were considered together in this interpretation wave.
summary_for_embedding: Batch allocation ledger listing six core claude-ds source files, including TypeScript declarations, JSX components, and an HTML generative core file, with project and root metadata.
intention_for_embedding: To record which claude-ds core files were assigned to interpretive batch 026 in wave 002 for downstream analysis or fusion.
